templates.label: Inspiración (vídeo hook)
templates.prompt_template: Cinematic 5-second video of {scene}, vibrant warm colors, golden hour, slight motion blur, joyful atmosphere, premium wedding/event editorial cinematic style, no text overlays
scenes: a couple toasting champagne with confetti falling around them
festoon string lights flickering above a crowded dancefloor at twilight
hands cutting an elegant tiered cake at a celebration
a bouquet of pampas grass and roses being thrown into the air
guests dancing with sparklers in their hands at night
champagne being poured with bubbles overflowing
rose petals falling slowly on a wedding aisle
fireworks reflecting on faces of laughing friends
templates.caption_brief: Caption corto (max 120 chars), tono vibrante y joven en castellano, con un hook punzante (pregunta o frase que genere FOMO). Acaba con CTA suave: 'Tu fiesta empieza en fiestago.es'. SIN emojis al inicio, máximo 2 emojis estratégicos al final.

templates.label: Tip educativo (carrusel imagen)
templates.prompt_template: Aesthetic flat-lay photograph of wedding planning materials on a marble surface, soft natural light, ivory and gold tones, premium editorial style, no text or letters visible, elegant minimal composition
topics: 5 cosas que toda boda olvida planificar (y cómo evitarlo)
El timing perfecto: cuándo reservar cada proveedor
Cómo dividir tu presupuesto de boda sin pasarte
Errores típicos al organizar un cumple en casa
Por qué reservar tarde te cuesta el doble
La diferencia entre una fiesta organizada y una caos
Comuniones sin estrés: el orden ideal de reservas
Despedidas: planificar 6 meses antes vs improvisar
templates.caption_brief: Caption tipo carrusel educativo (200-300 chars), tono cercano pero profesional, abre con un hook problema, da 2-3 bullet con tips, cierra con CTA 'Explora packs en fiestago.es'. Tono vibrante pero útil.

templates.label: Promo de pack
templates.prompt_template: Premium editorial photograph of {pack_visual}, golden hour, soft warm tones, aspirational lifestyle aesthetic, no text overlays, magazine-quality composition

packs.visual: an intimate Spanish wedding ceremony at sunset with candle-lit tables
packs.name: Pack Boda Íntima

packs.visual: a luxurious birthday celebration with balloon arches and elegant dinner setup
packs.name: Pack Cumple Premium

packs.visual: a bachelorette party in a beach villa with cocktails and flower decorations
packs.name: Pack Despedida en Villa

packs.visual: an elegant communion lunch with white flowers and pastel decorations
packs.name: Pack Comunión Clásica

templates.caption_brief: Caption promocional, tono entusiasta. Estructura: hook con beneficio principal → qué incluye (3 puntos) → precio → CTA 'Reserva en fiestago.es'. Genera urgencia sin ser cargante.

templates.label: Testimonio cliente
templates.prompt_template: Joyful candid photograph of {client_scene}, warm authentic emotion, soft natural light, real-moment editorial style, no text overlays
scenes: two friends laughing during a toast at a casual home party
a couple looking at each other lovingly at their wedding ceremony
a mother hugging her child at a communion celebration
a group of friends raising glasses at a bachelorette dinner
templates.caption_brief: Caption tipo testimonio: cita entre comillas (40-80 chars), nombre + ciudad + tipo de evento, cierra con CTA suave 'Tu historia es la próxima · fiestago.es'. Tono auténtico y emocional.

templates.label: Behind the scenes
templates.prompt_template: Behind-the-scenes 5-second video showing {bts_scene}, candid documentary style, warm authentic colors, slight handheld camera motion, no text overlays
scenes: florists arranging cascading wedding bouquets in a sun-lit workshop
a chef plating elegant tapas in a professional kitchen
a DJ setting up speakers and lights at golden hour at a venue
wedding planners reviewing seating charts on a long table covered in materials
templates.caption_brief: Caption tipo BTS: revela algo del proceso (qué hacemos detrás de un evento), genera transparencia y confianza. Termina con 'Por eso encajamos · fiestago.es'.

templates.label: FOMO temporada
templates.prompt_template: Cinematic 5-second video of {seasonal_scene}, urgent yet aspirational mood, vibrant colors, golden hour, professional editorial quality, no text overlays
scenes: a calendar with marked wedding dates rapidly filling up
an elegant venue with the last few empty chairs being filled
champagne bottles lined up on ice with hands grabbing them
string lights turning on across a venue at dusk
templates.caption_brief: Caption con urgencia: 'Quedan X fechas/plazas/packs en {ciudad}'. Tono vibrante, FOMO sin agobiar. CTA 'Reserva ya en fiestago.es'.
